data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Provider visibility of completion status', but the evidence does not demonstrate how this visibility is achieved. While the linked use case mentions a provider dashboard showing completion percentages, there are no specific API endpoints or data structures provided that confirm the implementation of this feature. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or data structures that provide provider visibility of completion status.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Define API endpoint for provider dashboard
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the endpoint returns completion status data for providers.
